case_title: DARRYL C. LEUNG VS. DAVID A. MILLER ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL LEASE-RENTAL AGREEMENT IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND CLERK'S JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES ONLY. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, DARRYL C. AS TRUSTEE, OR ANY SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE, OF THE DARRYL C. LEUNG REVOCABLE TRUST, DATED JULY 26, 2007
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $86.66 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, DARRYL C. AS TRUSTEE, OR ANY SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE, OF THE DARRYL C. LEUNG REVOCABLE TRUST, DATED JULY 26, 2007

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, DARRYL C. AS TRUSTEE, OR ANY SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE, OF THE DARRYL C. LEUNG REVOCABLE TRUST, DATED JULY 26, 2007 AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, DAVID A. DOES 1 TO20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, DARRYL C. AS TRUSTEE, OR ANY SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE, OF THE DARRYL C. LEUNG REVOCABLE TRUST, DATED JULY 26, 2007 SERVED AUG-12-2016, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO20, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, DAVID A.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, DAVID A.
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-27-2026.

RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, DARRYL C. AS TRUSTEE, OR ANY SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE, OF THE DARRYL C. LEUNG REVOCABLE TRUST, DATED JULY 26, 2007 AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, DAVID A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEUNG, DARRYL C. AS TRUSTEE, OR ANY SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE, OF THE DARRYL C. LEUNG REVOCABLE TRUST, DATED JULY 26, 2007 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, DAVID A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1326 HAIGHT STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY WILLIAMS, STEVEN C

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, DARRYL C. AS TRUSTEE, OR ANY SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE, OF THE DARRYL C. LEUNG REVOCABLE TRUST, DATED JULY 26, 2007 SERVED AUG-12-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, DAVID A.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, DAVID A.
